Subject: Farewell and Best Wishes

Dear Team,

As I prepare to embark on a new journey, I want to express my heartfelt gratitude for the incredible experiences and support I've received from each of you. Working alongside such talented and dedicated individuals has been a true privilege. I will cherish the memories and lessons learned during my time here. Wishing you all continued success and happiness in your future endeavors.

Warm regards,  
[Your Name]
